description: Mechanically-derived D2 planted case (scripts/generate_gold_fixtures.py) for hard_rejection rule 'no-exclusivity': counterparty inserts language containing the trigger term 'sole provider' into the 'exclusivity' topic. Must fire no-exclusivity and result in REQUEST_CHANGE.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: The parties agree to add the following clause language to this section of the Agreement: 'sole provider'.
planted_variation.notes: Mechanically generated: contains trigger_term 'sole provider' (match=word_boundary) for rule 'no-exclusivity'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Inserted hunk contains trigger_term 'sole provider', which is not in ['non-exclusive']; must fire 'no-exclusivity'.
